# Google Cloud Next 2022, Dart partnership with GitHub, and more dev news!

<SocialEmbed platform="youtube" id="Ay5O5H9MAlI" />

## Description

TL;DR 315 | The Google Developer News Show

0:00 - Introduction
0:10 - Partnering with GitHub on supply chain security for Dart packages → https://goo.gle/3EKj2Fs 
0:32 - Google Cloud Next 2022 → https://goo.gle/3EKiXSa 
0:46 - CircularNet: Reducing waste with Machine Learning → https://goo.gle/3CUjr7g 
1:20 - Kick Start Round G → https://goo.gle/3ET648P 
1:51 -  Don’t forget to like, comment, and subscribe!
 
Here to bring you the latest developer news from across Google is Rody from Developer Relations. Tune in every week for a new episode, and let us know what you think of the latest announcements in the comments below.

Follow Google Developers on Instagram → https://goo.gle/googledevs             

Watch more #DevShow → https://goo.gle/GDevShow               
Subscribe to Google Developers → https://goo.gle/developers 

#Google #Developers

## Transcript

### Introduction

**0:00** · \[AUDIO LOGO\] RODY DAVIS: Hi, I'm Rody, for The Developer Show.

**0:06** · And this is your weekly update on the coolest developer news from Google.

### Partnering with GitHub on supply chain security for Dart packages

**0:10** · Let's start with some exciting new Dart news.

**0:12** · Starting today, GitHub now supports Dart in the advisory database, dependency graph, and Dependabot.

**0:18** · This means it's now possible to fully support supply chain security for Dart and Flutter apps.

**0:23** · If there's an issue detected, a pull request will be automatically created with the patch for your project.

**0:28** · You can find out more on the GitHub blog link below.

### Google Cloud Next 2022

**0:32** · Make sure to attend the last day of Google Cloud Next.

**0:34** · It is free to register, and there'll be some exciting news about what is coming next for Google Cloud.

**0:39** · There'll also be a lot of developer-specific content in the Developer Zone.

**0:42** · You can find out more on cloud.withgoogle.com.next.

**0:45** · Next, we head over to TensorFlow to talk about the new circular net model and how it's being used to help recycle waste.

### CircularNet: Reducing waste with Machine Learning

**0:53** · This model is being trained on thousands of images from the mass RCNN algorithm, which is implemented from the TensorFlow garden.

**1:00** · By collaborating with experts in the recycling industry, it is now possible to annotate the data in the model that is used for different material types, such as paper, metal, plastic, and even specific plastic types.

**1:11** · The goal is to collaborate with stakeholders across the waste management ecosystem.

**1:15** · So if you're interested, reach out to waste innovation external@google.com.

### Kick Start Round G

**1:21** · Have you tried Kick Start yet?

**1:22** · It's not too late.

**1:23** · Join us for a penultimate Kick Start round on the season on October 15.

**1:26** · Kick Start is a coding competition that aims to help coders strengthen their programming skills while having fun.

**1:32** · Tackle interesting algorithmic problems and test your skills.

**1:35** · There's only two rounds left this year.

**1:37** · So don't miss out on all the fun.

**1:38** · Head over to g.co/kickstart to learn more and sign up for the round G taking place on October 15.

**1:44** · Or check out @GCodingComps on Twitter for the latest updates and info on Google's coding competitions.

### Don’t forget to like, comment, and subscribe!

**1:51** · To learn more about all this week's stories, make sure to check the description box below for all the links.

**1:56** · And please remember to like, subscribe, share, and stay safe.

**1:59** · I'm Rody for The Developer Show.

**2:00** · Thanks for watching, and I'll see you next week.

**2:05** · \[LAUGHTER\]
